fullArticle:
British-Indian brand Desi Daru has secured a listing at Tamarind of Mayfair in London for its Alphonso Mango vodka.

The brand’s mango vodka is featured as the main ingredient in three signature cocktails on the Terrace at Tamarind of Mayfair.

Tamarind is the capital’s first Indian restaurant to receive a Michelin star.

Desi Vesper combines the English winter wheat-based mango vodka with lime leaf-infused Sapling gin, Cocchi Americano, and manzanilla Sherry. The result is a crisp, aromatic, and dry summer serve.

The Summer Negroni pairs the spirits with Suze, peach, Cocchi Americano Rosa, and mandarin bitters, delivering a bittersweet, sunlit take on the classic.

Mango Sling crowns the Desi Daru’s signature serves by mixing Alphonso Mango Vodka, elderflower, verjus, bitters, raspberry,...
